text:
- Update to 3.1.7.1
From the changelog:
"FreeBSD users may want to upgrade because of a very remote chance of 3.1.7 and previous crashing once every few years."

Removed file(s):
- files/patch-lwres.cc
- files/patch-pdns_nameserver.cc
- files/patch-pdns_recursor.cc

Port maintainer (sten@blinkenlights.nl) is cc'd.
